ast.source: Today's Daily Note not found. Creating daily note for today

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable this to check existing previous notes rather than days. For example, if set to check 1 previous day, and this option is enabled, the plugin will look for todos in the latest daily note, even if that note is older than 1 day.
ast.target: 启用此选项以检查已有的先前笔记而不是天数。例如，若设置为检查前 1 天且启用此选项，插件将会在最新的每日笔记中查找待办，即使该笔记早于 1 天。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable this to group incomplete todos by any headings they are under. If disabled, or a previousheading is not found in today's note, the incomplete todos are ended to the end of today's note.
ast.target: 启用此项可将未完成的待办按其所属标题分组。若禁用，或在今天的笔记中找不到 previousheading，未完成的待办将移至今天笔记的末尾。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Number of previous days to check for todos

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Check previous existing notes instead of days
ast.target: 检查之前已有的笔记而非天数

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在运行嵌套每日待办
